content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Most Unstable Array". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1353/A
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. The first line of each test case contains an integer n, the size of the array. The next line contains n space-separated integers, the elements of the array.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the maximum difference between the largest and smallest element in the array.

code.Python3:
import sys
for _ in range(int(input())):
    n = int(input())
    arr = list(map(int, input().split()))
    arr.sort()
    print(arr[-1] - arr[0])
